name: ltspice-automation
description: Create, simulate, validate, parse, and report LTspice RC, RL, and RLC step-response workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and verify LTspice RC/RL/RLC step-response circuits.
interface.longDescription: Local Codex tools that generate visible LTspice .asc schematics for RC low-pass, RL step-response, and underdamped series RLC step-response circuits, run batch simulations, parse .log measurements, validate results against circuit theory, and write Markdown simulation reports with PASS/FAIL summaries.
defaultPrompt: Create and simulate a visible RC low-pass circuit.
Create and simulate a visible RL step-response circuit.
Create and simulate an underdamped RLC step-response circuit.
Parse this LTspice log and summarize measurements.
